scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "corepack pnpm run dev:web" "corepack pnpm run dev:api"
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter web lint && cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy -p gloq-api --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter web test && corepack pnpm --filter web lint && cargo test -p gloq-api
